Question: Michaela has $$\text{$2.05}$$ in dimes and nickels in her change purse. She has seven more dimes than nickels. How many coins of each type does she have?
Liliana has $$\text{$2.10}$$ in nickels and quarters in her backpack. She has $$12$$ more nickels than quarters. How many coins of each type does she have?
Sumanta has $$\text{$4.20}$$ in nickels and dimes in her desk drawer. She has twice as many nickels as dimes. How many coins of each type does she have?
Alison has three times as many dimes as quarters in her purse. She has $$\text{$9.35}$$ altogether. How many coins of each type does she have?

Jesse has $$\text{$6.55}$$ worth of quarters and nickels in his pocket. The number of nickels is five more than two times the number of quarters. How many nickels and how many quarters does Jesse have?
Elaine has $$\text{$7.00}$$ in dimes and nickels in her coin jar. The number of dimes that Elaine has is seven less than three times the number of nickels. How many of each coin does Elaine have?

The first day of a water polo tournament, the total value of tickets sold was $$\text{$17,610} .$$ One-day passes sold for $$\text{$20}$$ and tournament passes sold for $$\text{$30} .$$ The number of tournament passes sold was $$37$$ more than the number of day passes sold. How many day passes and how many tournament passes were sold?

At the movie theater, the total value of tickets sold was $$\text{$2,612.50} .$$ Adult tickets sold for $$\text{$10}$$ each and senior/child tickets sold for $$\text{$7.50}$$ each. The number of senior/child tickets sold was $$25$$ less than twice the number of adult tickets sold. How many senior/child tickets and how many adult tickets were sold?

Eric paid $$\text{$16.64}$$ for stamps so he could mail thank you notes for his wedding gifts. The number of $$\text{49-cent}$$ stamps was eight more than twice the number of $$\text{8-cent}$$ stamps. How many $$\text{49-cent}$$ stamps and how many $$\text{8-cent}$$ stamps did Eric buy?

Kailee paid $$\text{$14.84}$$ for stamps. The number of $$\text{49-cent}$$ stamps was four less than three times the number of $$\text{21-cent}$$ stamps. How many $$\text{49-cent}$$ stamps and how many $$\text{21-cent}$$ stamps did Kailee buy?
